LumenRail builds autonomous night trains between major European cities, and each train has quiet sleep pods, noise-canceling cabins, and an onboard concierge that handles meal and route requests.
Tickets are sold in three classes called Cabin, Studio, and Suite; Suite includes private shower access and priority platform transfer, while Cabin has shared amenities and the lowest price.
Customer policy says full refunds are allowed only within twenty-four hours after booking, but damaged luggage claims are compensated within seventy-two hours if passengers submit photos in the app.
Operations leadership tracks punctuality, sleeper comfort score, and claim-resolution time every Monday, and route schedules are adjusted monthly using those metrics plus seasonal demand forecasts.
